pokemon:klang.name: Klang
pokemon:klang.summary: A minigear and big gear comprise its body. If the minigear it launches at a foe doesn’t return, it will die.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: A minigear and big gear comprise its body. If the minigear it launches at a foe doesn’t return, it will die.
By changing the direction in which it rotates, it communicates its feelings to others. When angry, it rotates faster.
A minigear and big gear comprise its body. If the minigear it launches at a foe doesn’t return, it will die.
By changing the direction in which it rotates, it communicates its feelings to others. When angry, it rotates faster.
Many companies in the Galar region choose Klang as their logo. This Pokémon is considered the symbol of industrial technology.
When Klang goes all out, the minigear links up perfectly with the outer part of the big gear, and this Pokémon’s rotation speed increases sharply.
Spinning minigears are rotated at high speed and repeatedly fired away. It is dangerous if the gears don’t return.
A minigear and big gear comprise its body. If the minigear it launches at a foe doesn’t return, it will die.
By changing the direction in which it rotates, it communicates its feelings to others. When angry, it rotates faster.
A minigear and big gear comprise its body. If the minigear it launches at a foe doesn’t return, it will die.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: A minigear and big gear comprise its body. If the minigear it launches at a foe doesn’t return, it will die.

pokemon:klink.name: Klink
pokemon:klink.summary: The two minigears that mesh together are predetermined. Each will rebound from other minigears without meshing.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The two minigears that mesh together are predetermined. Each will rebound from other minigears without meshing.
The two minigears that mesh together are predetermined. Each will rebound from other minigears without meshing.
Two bodies comprise a fixed pair. They spin around each other to generate energy.
Interlocking two bodies and spinning around generates the energy they need to live.
It’s suspected that Klink were the inspiration behind ancient people’s invention of the first gears.
The two minigears that compose this Pokémon are closer than twins. They mesh well only with each other.
Interlocking two bodies and spinning around generates the energy they need to live.
Two bodies comprise a fixed pair. They spin around each other to generate energy.
Interlocking two bodies and spinning around generates the energy they need to live.
The two minigears that mesh together are predetermined. Each will rebound from other minigears without meshing.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: The two minigears that mesh together are predetermined. Each will rebound from other minigears without meshing.

pokemon:klinklang.name: Klinklang
pokemon:klinklang.summary: Its red core functions as an energy tank. It fires the charged energy through its spikes into an area.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Its red core functions as an energy tank. It fires the charged energy through its spikes into an area.
Its red core functions as an energy tank. It fires the charged energy through its spikes into an area.
The minigear spins at high speed. Then the energy from the red core charges the minigear to make it ready to fire.
The gear with the red core is rotated at high speed for a rapid energy charge.
The three gears that compose this Pokémon spin at high speed. Its new spiked gear isn’t a living creature.
From its spikes, it launches powerful blasts of electricity. Its red core contains an enormous amount of energy.
The gear with the red core is rotated at high speed for a rapid energy charge.
The minigear spins at high speed. Then the energy from the red core charges the minigear to make it ready to fire.
The gear with the red core is rotated at high speed for a rapid energy charge.
Its red core functions as an energy tank. It fires the charged energy through its spikes into an area.

loreSummary: Its red core functions as an energy tank. It fires the charged energy through its spikes into an area.
